reference: I was asked to have a semen analysis test. I went to the lab, but I noticed great embarrassment. I entered the procedure room but could not achieve an erection for many minutes; my heart rate increased. Then I started rubbing wildly. I ejaculated very quickly with a very minimal erection. The test report said: sperm count = nil. I am very upset. What should I do now? There is no family history of infertility.
text: I was asked to have a semen analysis test, I went to the lab, but I noticed Rayden therapy. I entered the procedure room, but could not achieve an erection for many minutes; my heart rate increased, then I started rubbing wildly. I ejaculated very quickly with a very minimal erection. The test report said: sperm count: nil. I am very upset. What should I do now? There is no family history of infertility.
